message:
test(calm-saga): add CALM-optimized saga integration tests (bd-2wrsc.3)

55 integration tests covering monotonicity classification ground truth,
lattice join-semilattice laws (commutativity, associativity, idempotence,
identity), conflict detection, execution plan batching, order independence
(1000 random orderings), executor behavior with validation and fallback,
evidence ledger integration, monotone ratio edge cases, deterministic
execution, proptest suites for lattice laws and random plans, and CRDT
obligation ledger integration (state progression, conflict detection,
merge commutativity).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
